name: lohparkir-backend
description: LohParkir REST API — Sistem Validasi Parkir Resmi Kota Medan

scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool} = require('pg'); const fs = require('fs'); const pool = new Pool(); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('../database/migrations/001_init.sql','utf8')).then(()=>console.log('Migration done')).catch(console.error).finally(()=>pool.end())"
scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool} = require('pg'); const fs = require('fs'); const pool = new Pool(); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('../database/seeds/001_seed.sql','utf8')).then(()=>console.log('Seed done')).catch(console.error).finally(()=>pool.end())"
